chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1065 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6558/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6559/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6560/2025 (R/Surety) 17.11.2025 Applicant / Surety, Kareem Dad Chachar, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Abdul Farooque alias Farooque, who on 05.11.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate amounting to Rs.50,000/-, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from letter dated 08.11.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
